CVE-2024-38448.title: htags in GNU Global through 6.6.12 allows code execution in situa ...
CVE-2024-38448.description: htags in GNU Global through 6.6.12 allows code execution in situations where dbpath (aka -d) is untrusted, because shell metacharacters may be used.
